info.description: Comprehensive API testing collection for Fixxa AI functions integrated with Django backend

request.description: Check if database connection is working and list available tables
Get available test user IDs for testing (optional endpoint)

item.name: 2. Voice Processing - Quotes

request.description: Fetch latest quote audio from Supabase, transcribe, extract data, and create quote in database

response.name: Success Response
response.body:
{
  "success": true,
  "quote_id": 123,
  "quote_number": "QT-2026-0001",
  "client_name": "John Doe",
  "total": 1200.00,
  "transcription": "I would like to make a quote for John Doe...",
  "message": "Quote created successfully from voice recording",
  "client_data": {
    "status": "quote",
    "client_name": "John Doe",
    "email": "john@example.com",
    "phone": "1234567890",
    "address": "123 Main St",
    "service_type": "Plumbing",
    "estimated_cost": 1200.00,
    "services": [
      {
        "description": "Fix leaky pipes",
        "service": "Plumbing",
        "rate": "50/hr",
        "duration": "4 hours"
      }
    ],
    "materials": [
      {
        "material": "Pipes",
        "quantity": 2,
        "unit_price": "$100",
        "amount": "$200"
      }
    ]
  }
}

response.name: Error Response - No Audio Found

request.description: Upload audio file directly, transcribe, and extract data (without creating quote)

response.name: Success Response

request.description: Just transcribe audio file to text (no data extraction)

response.name: Success Response

item.name: 3. Voice Processing - Invoices

request.description: Fetch latest invoice audio from Supabase, transcribe, extract data, and create invoice

response.name: Success Response
response.body:
{
  "success": true,
  "invoice_id": 456,
  "invoice_number": "INV-2026-0001",
  "client_name": "Sarah Williams",
  "total": 2000.00,
  "transcription": "I would like to make an invoice for Sarah Williams...",
  "message": "Invoice created successfully from voice recording"
}

request.description: Convert existing quote to invoice (standard Django endpoint, not AI)

item.description: Voice processing endpoints for invoice creation

item.name: 4. Natural Language Chatbot

request.description: Ask about client information in natural language

response.name: Success Response
response.body:
{
  "success": true,
  "question": "Show me all my clients",
  "sql_query": "SELECT name, email, phone_number FROM client_information WHERE user_id = 'fa830eb7-310e-4f9f-bb35-dff1d77e072d'",
  "answer": "You have 15 clients. Here are their names: John Doe, Jane Smith, Bob Johnson...",
  "raw_data": "[('John Doe', 'john@example.com', '123-456-7890'), ...]",
  "user_id": "fa830eb7-310e-4f9f-bb35-dff1d77e072d",
  "timestamp": "2026-01-07T10:30:00"
}

response.name: Success Response
response.body:
{
  "success": true,
  "question": "What are my total unpaid invoices this month?",
  "sql_query": "SELECT SUM(total) FROM invoices WHERE user_id = 'xxx' AND payment_status = 'unpaid' AND EXTRACT(MONTH FROM created_at) = EXTRACT(MONTH FROM CURRENT_DATE)",
  "answer": "You have $5,200 in unpaid invoices this month.",
  "raw_data": "[(5200.00,)]",
  "user_id": "fa830eb7-310e-4f9f-bb35-dff1d77e072d",
  "timestamp": "2026-01-07T10:30:00"
}

response.name: Success Response
response.body:
{
  "success": true,
  "question": "How many quotes did I send this year?",
  "answer": "You sent 48 quotes this year.",
  "sql_query": "SELECT COUNT(*) FROM quotes WHERE user_id = 'xxx' AND EXTRACT(YEAR FROM created_at) = EXTRACT(YEAR FROM CURRENT_DATE)",
  "raw_data": "[(48,)]"
}

request.description: Ask about revenue and financial analytics

response.name: Success Response
response.body:
{
  "success": true,
  "question": "What's my total revenue from paid invoices?",
  "answer": "Your total revenue from paid invoices is $125,450.",
  "sql_query": "SELECT SUM(total) FROM invoices WHERE user_id = 'xxx' AND payment_status = 'paid'",
  "raw_data": "[(125450.00,)]"
}

request.description: Ask about media files and documents

response.name: Success Response

item.description: Natural language to SQL chatbot endpoints

item.name: 5. Example Chat Questions

request.description:
Examples:
- List all my clients with their contact information
- How many clients do I have?
- Show me clients added this month
- Find client by name John
- What's the email for client XYZ?

Examples:
- What are my unpaid invoices?
- Show me all invoices for client John Smith
- What's my total revenue this quarter?
- List invoices created in December 2025
- Which invoices are overdue?

Examples:
- What's my total revenue year to date?
- How many invoices did I send this month?
- What's my average invoice amount?
- Show me my top 5 clients by revenue
- What's the total value of all my quotes?

item.description: Collection of example questions you can ask the chatbot
